user.title: PlanoReads Water
user.description: Enter the same details you use at cus.plano.gov/planoreads. The meter ID is shown on the portal after you log in (next to your account).

data.history_days: Days of history to request each poll

error.invalid_auth: The portal rejected the account / ZIP / meter (or it is temporarily throttling logins). Double-check the values and try again in a few minutes.
error.cannot_connect: Logged in but could not read the hourly table. The portal may have changed.
